name: P:GTA.NaturalMotion.HighFallHelper.LegAsymmetry
summary: 0.0 for stuntman.  Random offset applied per leg to the angular speed to desynchronize the pedaling - set to 0 to disable, otherwise should be set to less than the angularSpeed value.
remarks:
Default value = 4.0f.
            Min value = -10.0f.
            Max value = 10.0f.
